info.title: Azure Compute Limit API
info.description: Microsoft Azure Compute Limit Resource Provider.

get.description: List the operations for the provider
Lists all compute limit features for the subscription at the specified location.
Gets the properties of a compute limit feature.

post.description: Disables a compute limit feature for the subscription at the specified location.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

post.description: Enables a compute limit feature for the subscription at the specified location.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The content of the action request

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

get.description: Lists all guest subscriptions in a location.
Gets the properties of a guest subscription.

put.description: Adds a subscription as a guest to consume the compute limits shared by the host subscription.

delete.description: Deletes a subscription as a guest to stop consuming the compute limits shared by the host subscription.

get.description: Lists all shared limit cap configurations visible to the caller's subscription.
Gets the shared limit cap configuration for a VM family, as visible to the caller's subscription.

put.description: Creates or replaces the shared limit cap configuration for a VM family.

delete.description: Deletes the shared limit cap configuration for a VM family. The caller's subscription is treated as the host subscription.

get.description: Lists all per-member cap overrides configured under a SharedLimitCap.
Gets the cap override configured for a single member subscription.

put.description: Creates or replaces the cap override for a single member subscription.

delete.description: Removes the per-member cap override for a member subscription.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: The content of the action request

get.description: Lists all compute limits shared by the host subscription with its guest subscriptions.
Gets the properties of a compute limit shared by the host subscription with its guest subscriptions.

put.description: Enables sharing of a compute limit by the host subscription with its guest subscriptions.

delete.description: Disables sharing of a compute limit by the host subscription with its guest subscriptions.

get.description: Lists all VM families for the subscription at the specified location.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: The filter to apply to the list operation. Filter can be applied to the 'category' property. Example: $filter=category eq 'generalPurposeCategory'.

get.description: Gets the properties of a VM family.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

FeatureEnableRequest.description: Request body for feature enable action.

serviceTreeId.description: The Service Tree identifier associated with this feature action.

FeatureListResult.description: The response of a Feature list operation.

value.description: The Feature items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

FeatureProperties.description: Properties of the compute limit feature.

state.description: The current state of the feature (for example, Enabled, Disabled).

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource.

FeatureState.description: The allowed states for a compute limit feature.

GuestSubscription.description: Guest subscription that consumes shared compute limits.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

GuestSubscriptionListResult.description: The response of a GuestSubscription list operation.

value.description: The GuestSubscription items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource.

MemberCap.description: Per-member cap override. Pairs a member subscription with its cap value.

subscriptionId.description: The member subscription identifier this cap applies to.

cap.description: The cap value in count units for this member subscription.

MemberCapOverride.description:
Member cap override as a standalone child resource of `SharedLimitCap`.
Use this resource to read or modify a single member's cap without
resending the entire `memberCapOverrides` array on the parent.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

MemberCapOverrideListResult.description: The response of a MemberCapOverride list operation.

value.description: The MemberCapOverride items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

MemberCapOverrideProperties.description: Properties of a per-member cap override.

cap.description: The cap value in count units for this member subscription.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource.

memberCapOverrides.description:
The full set of per-member cap overrides to persist for this resource.
This call replaces the existing set entirely; supply an empty array
(`[]`) to clear all overrides.
The per-member cap overrides as persisted after the action completed.

SharedLimit.description: Compute limits shared by the subscription.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

SharedLimitCap.description:
Shared limit cap configuration for a VM family, owned by a host subscription
and propagated to its member subscriptions. The same resource type is
readable by host and member subscriptions, but write operations (PUT/DELETE)
are scoped to the caller's subscription as the host.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

SharedLimitCapListResult.description: The response of a SharedLimitCap list operation.

value.description: The SharedLimitCap items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

SharedLimitCapProperties.description: Properties of a shared limit cap resource.

defaultMemberCap.description:
The default member cap value (in count units).
Set to a non-negative integer to apply a cap to all member subscriptions
that do not have a per-member override. Omit the property to leave no
default cap in effect.

isBoundedCap.description:
Controls whether the service validates the aggregate cap against the
group limit for the VM family.

SUM(caps) is the sum of all per-member overrides' cap values plus
`defaultMemberCap` multiplied by the number of member subscriptions without an override.

When true, the service rejects any configuration where SUM(caps)
exceeds the group limit. When false, SUM(caps) is permitted to exceed
the group limit.

Enabling this flag is rejected if the current configuration already breaches the group limit;
reduce caps first, then enable.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource.

SharedLimitListResult.description: The response of a SharedLimit list operation.

value.description: The SharedLimit items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

SharedLimitProperties.description: Properties of the compute shared limit.

limit.description: The maximum permitted usage of the resource.

unit.description: The quota units, such as Count.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource.

VmFamily.description: VM family resource representing a virtual machine family and its category.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

value.description: The VmFamily items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

VmFamilyProperties.description: Properties of a VM family resource.

category.description: The category of the VM family (for example, GeneralPurpose, ComputeOptimized).

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource.
